headline: Drug Screening Market Research and Global Forecast Report 2025-2030: Opportunities Expand with Oral Fluid Adoption, Fingerprint-Based Workplace Testing and Emerging Market Growth
summary: The global drug screening market is poised to grow from USD 10.36 billion in 2025 to USD 21.29 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 15.5%, driven by stricter regulations and increased testing across safety-sensitive sectors. As substance use rises globally, with over 316 million drug users in 2023, impairment risks on roads and workplaces escalate.
